Name: Average time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 in the journal review process
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average waiting time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 until the next reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total resolution time of Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 defined as the duration from its occurrence to the finalization of reviewer assignment (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed followed by SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Time elapsed between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and SW-AE Assign Reviewers in variants where multiple assignments occur after reminders
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Average time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to SW-Reviewer No Response in cases where no agreement is reached
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Cycle time of Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 measured from its timestamp to the subsequent execution of SW-Reviewer Agreed in successful review paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that proceed to editorial decision after reviewer agreement
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation in revision-involved variants following reviewer agreement
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'
